user.title: Add SuteFoto LED
user.description: A light was discovered nearby. Select it, or choose manual entry to type a MAC address.

manual.title: Enter MAC address
manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your SuteFoto light (find it with a BLE scanner app, e.g. nRF Connect — look for a device named like ST40CRGB-XXXXXX).

bluetooth_confirm.title: Discovered SuteFoto LED
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}? Home Assistant will connect to it to confirm it works.

error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Expected something like AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF.
error.not_found: This device is not currently visible over Bluetooth. Make sure it is powered and in range, and that it is not connected to the SS LED phone app.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the light. Make sure it is not currently connected to the SS LED phone app (only one Bluetooth connection is allowed at a time), and try again.
